titleStmt.title: SII 27.408: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 408. (A.R. No. 480 of 1928-29.) GURUVĀYANAKERE, PUTTUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: East tier of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Śāntīśvara-basti.

This record with the beginning of each of the lines lost, is dated Śaka 1443, Śukla Māgha ba. 10, Monday. The cyclic year given corresponded to Śaka 1431, when the other details regularly correspond to 1530 A.D., February 4.
It records gifts of land garden with the consent of the residents of Beḷataṁgaḍi. All other details are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīma tparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādamōgha lāṁccanaṁ . jīyāttraiḷōkya nāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ . śakavarṣa sāvirada 443 neya śukla saṁvatsarada māgha bahuḷa daśamiyū sōmavā
nū taṁna syarūciyiṁda Aḷiyaṁdiru kuppayagaḷu rāma samudrada kadiri nārasiṁhya
dēvagaḷige koṭasāgubaḷiya vōleya kramaveṁteṁdare naṁma nārasihya dēvara Amṛtapaḍige saluva guṁḍlahaḷiya grāmadalū nīu
hostāgi kaṭista keṟiyakeḷage niṁma dasavaṁdada gadeya kaḷadu naṁma dēvastānada gadeyanū naṁma sāgubaḷiyūgi sāgista
vivara nere mariyāde cika Aubhaḷa sōmayājigaḷa keṟeya gadeya guttige kārige Āṟu khaṁḍuga koḍage Ēḷu khaṁḍuga
dalū naḍeyalāgi sīu kacista keṟiya keḷagaṇa gadeya Aḷateyakōlinavāsige nālu hacakaṭidu khaṁḍuga saha kārabhōga 1 ke
kha 1 ke guttige 37 koḍeya bhōga gadekha 1 ke guttige 38 Akṣaradalū kārige Ēḷu khaṁḍaga hoḍege Eṁṭukhaṁ
ḍugada maryyodeyalū kaṭuguttageyāgi salisauḷavaru keṟegenīrusālade sāvihōdaregadege sarivāgavanu mikkauḷa
varu keṟeyali nīrusāladidare goḍe Eṟeyalādare neremariyāmalū guttageyanū yiḷihikoḍa Uḷavaru kaṭugade
81 ke guttage roka 81 ... Alli Ārisina 81 ke guttage 81 . haṇanaḍayi maryādeyalū dēvasthānada bhaṁḍārake
Amrutapaḍige lekabhattavanū māṟaḷate bahahāge Āḷadukoḍa Uḷavaru yi maryādeyalu sāgi
si rūpumāḍikoṁḍu yihudu Eṁdu koṭa sāgubaḷiya vōle viṭṭana baraha Accayana
baraha śrī kadiri nārasihya maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.408 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
